products.title: OnePlus 15R 5G (12GB + 256GB, Charcoal Black)
products.short_description: OnePlus 15R with Snapdragon 8 Gen 5, 7400mAh battery, 165Hz AMOLED display and AI-powered performance for gaming and productivity.
products.long_description: The OnePlus 15R is a performance-focused flagship smartphone featuring the Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 processor, 12GB RAM, and 256GB storage. It offers a massive 7400mAh battery with fast charging support, making it ideal for heavy users and gamers. The 165Hz AMOLED display delivers ultra-smooth visuals, while AI-powered optimizations enhance gaming, multitasking, and system efficiency. The device also supports advanced durability with IP68/IP69 ratings and 4K 120fps video recording for creators.
pros: Excellent performance for gaming and multitasking
cons: Camera is average compared to ultra-premium flagships
Slightly bulky due to large battery
Price is on the higher side for mid-premium segment
Heating may occur under heavy gaming load

positive: Very smooth performance and gaming experience
Clean software experience with minimal bloatware
negative: Camera not flagship-level in all conditions
Some users report heating during heavy usage

offers: Cashback up to ₹1,514 on select cards
